title: melandrium keiskei var. minus
intro: Melandrium keiskei var. minus, also known as Japanese clematis or minus, is a type of flowering vine native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, Melandrium keiskei var. minus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
